report_name: Microsoft Scrambles to Patch 'RoguePlanet' Zero-Day in Defender After Public Exploit Release

threat_actors.name: Chaotic Eclipse
threat_actors.description: A security researcher who publicly released the 'RoguePlanet' (CVE-2026-50656) proof-of-concept exploit, allegedly in retaliation for a dispute with Microsoft's bug bounty program.

attack_patterns.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
attack_patterns.description: An attacker with standard user access exploits the 'RoguePlanet' vulnerability (CVE-2026-50656) in Microsoft Defender to escalate privileges to the SYSTEM level.

attack_patterns.name: Hijack Execution Flow
attack_patterns.description: The 'RoguePlanet' exploit leverages a race condition and symbolic links to manipulate file paths during a Defender scan, causing the high-privilege MsMpEng.exe process to execute an attacker's malicious payload.

attack_patterns.name: Windows Command Shell
attack_patterns.description: Successful exploitation of CVE-2026-50656 results in an arbitrary command shell running with SYSTEM privileges, allowing the attacker to execute further commands.

tools.name: Microsoft Defender
tools.description: The vulnerable security product whose core engine (mpengine.dll) and process (MsMpEng.exe) are exploited via a race condition in CVE-2026-50656 to achieve privilege escalation.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-50656
vulnerabilities.description: A high-severity local privilege escalation (LPE) zero-day vulnerability in the Microsoft Malware Protection Engine (mpengine.dll) caused by a race condition. An authenticated local attacker can exploit it by manipulating file paths with symbolic links during a scan to cause the SYSTEM-level MsMpEng.exe process to execute a malicious payload.

indicators.name: RoguePlanet LPE: MsMpEng.exe Spawning Shell
indicators.pattern:
title: RoguePlanet LPE - MsMpEng.exe Spawning Shell
id: 2b9a8f7e-1c3d-4b8a-9f0e-1a2b3c4d5e6f
status: experimental
description: Detects the Microsoft Defender process (MsMpEng.exe) spawning a command shell, which is a strong indicator of CVE-2026-50656 (RoguePlanet) exploitation.
references:
  - https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/microsoft-confirms-rogueplanet-defender_02022423645.html
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-18
tags:
  - attack.t1068
  - attack.privilege_escalation
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\MsMpEng.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the Microsoft Defender process (MsMpEng.exe) spawning a command shell, which is a strong indicator of CVE-2026-50656 (RoguePlanet) exploitation.

indicators.name: RoguePlanet LPE: Suspicious Defender Scan Command
indicators.pattern:
title: RoguePlanet LPE - Suspicious Defender Scan Command
id: 8c7d6e5f-2b4a-4d9f-8a1b-3c4d5e6f7a8b
status: experimental
description: Detects command-line invocations of the Microsoft Defender scanner (MpCmdRun.exe) targeting potentially suspicious file paths, which could indicate an attempt to stage the CVE-2026-50656 (RoguePlanet) exploit.
references:
  - https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/microsoft-confirms-rogueplanet-defender_02022423645.html
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-18
tags:
  - attack.t1068
  - attack.privilege_escalation
level: medium
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative scripts that trigger scans on temporary or user-writable directories.
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\MpCmdRun.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - '-Scan'
      - '-ScanType 3'
      - '-FilePath'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'C:\Users\'
      - 'C:\ProgramData\'
      - 'C:\Windows\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects command-line invocations of the Microsoft Defender scanner (MpCmdRun.exe) targeting unusual file paths, which could indicate an attempt to stage the CVE-2026-50656 (RoguePlanet) exploit.

relationships.source_name: RoguePlanet LPE: Suspicious Defender Scan Command
